meta.title: Leandro Damasio
desc: Computer Engineer. AI systems for finance and high-reliability environments.

AI Engineer at Enforce (BTG Pactual Group), based in São Paulo, Brazil. Builds production-grade AI systems for financial and legal domains where reliability, observability, and governance are not optional.

Work spans AI, software architecture, and infrastructure: agentic architectures, runtime control loops, evaluation and monitoring pipelines for LLM-based systems. Hands-on with vector search using pgvector and ParadeDB, prompt governance, and secure integration with internal and external data sources.
Founder and maintainer of RBX Systems, an open-source monorepo of AI agents, code agents, and system-level tooling focused on architecture and long-term maintainability.
Based in Brazil, working across Zürich and São Paulo. Available for selected engagements.

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.desc: A comprehensive overview of my technical expertise and proficiency across various domains.

aboutMe.title: About
aboutMe.desc: AI Engineer at Enforce (BTG Pactual Group), based in São Paulo, Brazil. Builds production-grade AI systems for financial and legal domains.
aboutMe.bio: Leandro Damasio has worked as a software engineer since the 1990s, beginning with PHP. Has since worked on software projects for major companies and institutions including FAPESP, NPL Brasil, Global Hitss, Arte Arena, and Stefanini.

highlights.name: Robson Bot
highlights.description: ROBSON BOT, an open-source cryptocurrency trading bot in Python, uses asynchronous and multi-tenant architecture for decisions based on probabilistic and technical analysis. Includes risk management, signal dissemination, trading strategies, React platform for dashboard, and Kubernetes for multi-user security.
highlights.technologies: python, django, react, docker, kubernetes, git

highlights.name: x.sh
highlights.description: A governed execution runtime for humans and agents. A local-first shell wrapper that turns real commands into durable, causal, machine-readable evidence, creating a hard trust boundary between actual execution and AI interpretation.

highlights.name: wt
highlights.description: CLI tool for Git worktree management with environment profiles. Enables rapid switching between isolated development contexts, each with its own environment variables and configurations.

highlights.name: playlist-fs
highlights.description: Playlists as filesystem projections over a canonical music library. A local-first, file-based toolkit where playlists are symlinked filesystem views. No daemon, no cloud, no login. Just files, symlinks, and shell.

highlights.name: Mint Workstation Ansible Bootstrap
highlights.description: Ansible playbooks for automated provisioning of Linux Mint workstations. Configures complete development environment with tools, dotfiles, and system preferences in a reproducible way.

curriculum.name: Leandro Damasio
curriculum.headline: Principal Software Engineer | Cloud and DevOps Specialist | AI/ML Engineer
curriculum.resume: Results-oriented Full-Stack Software Engineer and AI/ML Specialist with over 10 years of experience architecting and deploying scalable data products, advanced predictive models, and robust cloud-native solutions. Demonstrates comprehensive expertise across entire software development lifecycle, spanning architectural design, implementation, and DevOps automation, within industrial, financial, commercial, and research sectors. Proficiently utilizes Python, JavaScript, and leading cloud platforms to foster innovation and solve complex challenges. Employs asynchronous communication and distributed task management to build highly optimized systems, ensuring secure and stable performance to meet critical business demands. Committed to agile methodologies, promoting collaborative client engagement and continuous delivery.

professionalExperience.title: AI Engineer
description: Enforce is part of BTG Pactual Group and focuses on distressed credit and asset management.

Designed and implemented "Forja", an internal LLM experimentation and governance platform with RAG pipelines, vector databases (pgvector/ParadeDB) and prompt versioning, reducing the time to test new AI workflows from days to hours for data and product teams.
Built "Prompt-Maker", a FastAPI backend to centralize prompt and workflow governance, enabling consistent, auditable use of Generative AI across multiple internal systems.

Developed the conversational assistant "Atena", connecting LLMs to legal and financial data through retrieval pipelines and embeddings, significantly reducing analysis time for complex documents and cases.
Contributed to the legal analytics platform "Fase", integrating AI components into credit recovery and legal workflows, improving visibility and decision support for high-volume portfolios.
Structured a Kubernetes (k3s) + ArgoCD + GitOps environment for AI services, standardizing deployments, isolation and monitoring of GenAI workloads.

Promoted AI Engineering best practices — versioning, observability, evaluation and compliance-aware design — to ensure that AI systems are robust, traceable and aligned with financial-sector requirements.
Tech: Python, FastAPI, Kubernetes (k3s), ArgoCD, GitOps, Postgres/ParadeDB, pgvector, RAG pipelines, LLMs, embeddings, CI/CD, observability.

professionalExperience.title: Principal Software Engineer
description: Tech Lead & Principal Software Engineer, leading modernization of legacy systems into a cloud-native SaaS platform.
Migrated a critical Laravel API to Go, achieving a 42% faster deployment cycle and 39% reduction in compute costs, while improving scalability and reliability.
Led the design of a cloud-native SaaS platform using Python FastAPI and microservices, accelerating feature delivery by 85% through modularization and improved CI/CD.
Architected event-driven workflows with Kubernetes, Istio and ArgoCD, cutting infrastructure costs by 30% and improving operational resilience.
Led cross-functional teams to deliver a full-stack product built with React + FastAPI + AWS, aligning technical decisions with product and business goals.
Developed AI-enhanced features using Generative AI APIs and FastMCP (Python) to provide personalized user experiences and embedded AI capabilities in the product.
Tech: Go, Python, FastAPI, React, Kubernetes, Istio, ArgoCD, AWS, CI/CD, event-driven architecture, Generative AI APIs.

professionalExperience.title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Revamped FAPESP Virtual Library's search engine (Apache Solr), improving query response time by 37% through data indexing optimizations.
Directed a global full-stack team to deliver a Laravel-based application for academic research funding.
Resolved critical bugs in Django systems, improving stability for over 500,000 monthly users.

professionalExperience.title: Software Engineer
description: Automated data pipelines using Node.js and AWS, reducing manual processing time by 50%.
Integrated Google Cloud Document AI for automated document analysis, increasing operational efficiency.
Developed and implemented custom smart contracts on the Ethereum network, ensuring the security and integrity of cryptocurrency transactions.

professionalExperience.title: Software Engineer
description: Designed a scalable data lake with Hadoop and Spark, enabling real-time analytics for enterprise clients.
Reduced deployment cycles by 23% through CI/CD pipeline automation (ArgoCD, Docker).
Delivered full-stack applications using React and Nest.js for financial sector clients.

education.degree: Master in Public Administration and Government

keyAchievements.description: Implemented MLOps pipelines with Kubeflow to train and deploy demand forecasting models, reducing training time by 40% and improving model accuracy by 14%.
Migrated over 17 legacy systems to AWS/GCP, achieving 99.9% uptime.
Led over 8 end-to-end product launches across various sectors, from fintech to R&D.

works: Monitor of Ethics discipline in Undergraduate Course of Public Service Administration at Higher School of Administration and Management of State University of Santa Catarina
Founding President of National Federation of Public Administration Students

Researcher linked to School of Business Administration of State of São Paulo of Getúlio Vargas Foundation in partnership with Victor Civita Foundation, in a comparative research project on Performance in Basic Education in State of São Paulo: School management and quality of Education: a study on ten schools in São Paulo - https://pesquisa-eaesp.fgv.br/sites/gvpesquisa.fgv.br/files/arquivos/abrucio_-_gestao_escolar_e_qualidade_da_educacao_um_estudo_sobre_dez_escolas_paulistas.pdf

President of the think tank Instituto PVBLICA
Candidate for City Councilor for PPS in Urussanga (SC)
Agreement Manager of the City Hall of Urussanga

Full Stack Developer at NPL Brasil
